slides.headline: VA School Certifying Officials: New Rules Explained
slides.body: Understand the latest VA regulations impacting your role and students.

slides.headline: Understand the Update
slides.body: Learn the new Yellow Ribbon program changes and how they affect your certifications.

slides.headline: Compliance Made Easier
slides.body: Stay compliant with Chapter 33 updates, reducing errors in certifications.

slides.headline: Certifications Simplified
slides.body: Understand the changes to VA Form 22-1999 and streamline your certification process.

slides.headline: Student Eligibility
slides.body: New rules for determining student eligibility under the 85/15 rule.

slides.headline: Mental Health Support
slides.body: Implement the new Mental Health Act (MHA) for student veterans.
Get the full guide now. Link in bio.

outline.caption: Stay ahead of VA regulations with our comprehensive guide, covering updates and implementation timelines.

rubricBreakdown.critique: The 'Understand the Update' slide could benefit from a more concise headline to improve readability.
